items: 108 days until 2 August 2026 deadline — Full enforcement of Annex III high-risk AI rules begins. Conformity assessments, technical documentation, CE marking, and EU database registration must all be complete.

Employment AI confirmed high-risk — AI used for CV screening, candidate ranking, performance evaluation, promotion decisions, and dismissals is explicitly classified high-risk under Annex III. Non-compliance carries fines up to 3% of global turnover.

Customer profiling triggers high-risk by default — Any Annex III AI system that profiles natural persons (assessing preferences, behaviour, economic situation) automatically qualifies as high-risk, removing standard exemptions. Directly relevant to CX personalisation tools.

Transparency Code of Practice nearing finalisation — Draft Code on AI-generated content marking published Dec 2025; Commission expects final version by June 2026. Requires machine-readable marking of all AI-generated or manipulated content.

Notified body capacity severely limited — Most EU Member States still unprepared for conformity assessment infrastructure. Competition for assessment slots will intensify sharply in coming months — advisory opportunity for AKT to offer pre-assessment readiness services.
